summary: Comprehensive testing of LogiFlow Pro delivery management system completed successfully. All core features working including role-based authentication, financial dashboard, BOGO promotions, payment workflows, and earnings tracking.

ui_bugs.issue: Theme toggle not accessible from authenticated dashboards, only available on login page
Boss settings navigation via bottom nav occasionally times out, but direct access works

passed_tests: All 3 user role logins (boss/boss123, service1/service123, driver1/driver123)
Boss dashboard with financial metrics ($63.96 total orders, net profit calculation)
Boss pending collections and payment requests tabs
Boss settings page with payment method toggle (Hourly/Per Package rates)
Customer Service dashboard with order statistics
Customer Service new order creation with address input and product selection
BOGO promotion functionality (found 2 BOGO items, free gifts added automatically)
Driver dashboard with today's revenue and order statistics
Driver earnings page with date picker functionality
Driver payment submission to boss workflow
Driver hours logging for hourly payment method
Bottom navigation working across all 3 roles
Order creation updating financial data (revenue increased to $79.95)
Theme toggle on login page (dark/light mode)
Role-based access control and dashboard redirection
